title: Isla and the Case of the Missing Carrots
synopsis: When the carrots disappear from the community garden, young detective Isla teams up with her diverse group of animal friends to solve the mystery. Through clever clues and teamwork, they discover an unexpected culprit and learn about sharing and friendship.

pages.text: Isla loved the community garden. Every morning, she would check on the vegetables with her friends. Today felt different. Something was wrong. "Where are all the carrots?" Isla asked. The carrot patch was completely empty!

illustration.description: A young girl with curly brown hair and bright brown eyes stands in a colorful community garden, looking puzzled. Empty dirt patches where carrots should be are visible. The garden has vibrant green plants, red tomatoes, and yellow flowers in the background. Morning sunlight filters through the scene.
illustration.alt: Isla standing in the garden looking at empty carrot patches

pages.text: Marcus the mouse ran up to Isla. "I saw them yesterday!" he squeaked. "Big orange carrots everywhere!" Zara the zebra trotted over. "This is very strange," she said. "Who would take all our carrots?"

illustration.description: A small brown mouse with big worried eyes sits on Isla's shoulder while a friendly zebra with expressive eyes approaches. The zebra has traditional black and white stripes. All characters look concerned but determined. The garden setting shows various colorful vegetables in the background.
illustration.alt: Marcus the mouse on Isla's shoulder talking to Zara the zebra

pages.text: "We need to solve this mystery!" Isla declared. She pulled out her detective notebook. "Let's look for clues." The friends spread out across the garden. They needed to find out what happened to their carrots.

illustration.description: Isla holds a small colorful notebook and pencil, looking determined and excited. Her friends are scattered around the garden searching for clues. The scene shows teamwork and adventure with bright, encouraging colors. Flowers and vegetables create a cheerful backdrop.
illustration.alt: Isla with her detective notebook while friends search for clues

pages.text: "Look at this!" called Amir the ant. He pointed to small holes in the dirt. "These holes are everywhere!" Isla wrote in her notebook. Clue #1: Small holes in the carrot patch. "Good work, Amir!" she said.

illustration.description: A tiny black ant with big expressive eyes points to small holes in the rich brown dirt. Isla kneels down to examine the holes closely, her notebook open beside her. The dirt shows clear evidence of digging with scattered soil around the holes. Bright garden colors surround them.
illustration.alt: Amir the ant showing Isla the small holes in the dirt

pages.text: Sofia the squirrel found something else. "Orange pieces!" she chattered excitedly. "Little bits of carrot!" The pieces made a trail. The trail led away from the garden. "Let's follow it!" Isla said.

illustration.description: A fluffy gray squirrel with a bushy tail and bright eyes holds tiny orange carrot pieces in her paws. A trail of orange crumbs leads across green grass away from the garden. Sofia looks excited and proud of her discovery. Vibrant greens and oranges dominate the scene.
illustration.alt: Sofia the squirrel holding carrot pieces with a trail leading away

pages.text: The trail led to the old oak tree. More orange pieces scattered around the roots. "Someone brought our carrots here," Isla observed. She added to her notes: Clue #2: Carrot trail leads to oak tree. The mystery was getting interesting!

illustration.description: A magnificent old oak tree with thick brown bark and sprawling green branches towers above the group. Orange carrot pieces are scattered around the large roots. Isla stands looking up thoughtfully while writing in her notebook. Dappled sunlight creates a magical forest atmosphere.
illustration.alt: Isla and friends at the base of the old oak tree with carrot pieces scattered around

pages.text: "I hear something," whispered Zara. Everyone got very quiet. Crunch, crunch, crunch. The sound came from above them. "Something is eating up there!" Marcus squeaked. Isla looked up into the tree branches.

illustration.description: The group of friends all look up with surprised and curious expressions. Zara the zebra has her ears perked forward attentively. Tree branches create interesting shadows above them, and small bits of orange carrot can be seen falling from the leaves. The mood is suspenseful but not scary.
illustration.alt: All the friends looking up into the tree branches listening to crunching sounds

pages.text: "There!" Amir pointed with his tiny leg. "I see movement in the leaves!" Something brown and furry was hiding in the branches. It was definitely eating their carrots. "Hello up there!" Isla called out. "We know you're there!"

illustration.description: A shadowy brown furry shape is partially visible among the thick green leaves of the oak tree. Amir the ant points upward while Isla cups her hands around her mouth to call up. The mysterious figure looks startled and is clearly trying to hide behind the foliage.
illustration.alt: A brown furry creature hiding in the tree leaves while Isla calls up to it

pages.text: Very slowly, a small brown head peeked out. It was Benny the beaver! He looked embarrassed and sad. "I'm sorry," he called down quietly. "I was just so hungry." His big eyes filled with tears. Everyone felt bad for little Benny.

illustration.description: A small brown beaver with big sad eyes and prominent front teeth peeks out from behind green leaves. His expression shows shame and sadness. Orange carrot pieces are visible around him. The lighting is gentle and sympathetic, showing Benny as vulnerable rather than villainous.
illustration.alt: Benny the beaver peeking out sadly from the tree with carrot pieces around him

pages.text: Benny climbed down slowly. "I just moved here," he explained. "I don't know where to find food." He hung his head. "I was too shy to ask for help." Isla felt sorry for him. Being new was hard. Making friends was scary sometimes.

illustration.description: Benny the beaver sits on the grass looking down at his paws with a sad, ashamed expression. Isla kneels beside him with a kind, understanding look on her face. The other friends gather around supportively. Warm, comforting colors create an atmosphere of empathy and friendship.
illustration.alt: Benny the beaver looking sad while Isla and friends gather around supportively

pages.text: "Why didn't you just ask?" Sofia asked kindly. "We would have shared!" Benny looked surprised. "Really? You would share with me?" Marcus nodded. "Of course! Friends share with friends." Zara agreed. "The garden belongs to everyone."

illustration.description: The group of diverse animal friends forms a warm circle around Benny. Their expressions show kindness and acceptance. Sofia the squirrel reaches out a paw toward Benny in a gesture of friendship. Bright, warm colors convey the feeling of inclusion and community. Everyone looks happy and welcoming.
illustration.alt: The animal friends forming a welcoming circle around Benny the beaver

pages.text: "I'm sorry I took your carrots," Benny said. "I should have asked first." Isla smiled. "It's okay, Benny. Now we know what happened. And now you know you can ask us for help anytime!" Mystery solved! But there was still one problem to fix.

illustration.description: Isla gives Benny a warm, forgiving smile while placing a reassuring hand on his shoulder. Benny looks relieved and grateful. The other friends beam with approval in the background. The scene radiates warmth, forgiveness, and the joy of new friendship forming.
illustration.alt: Isla smiling kindly at Benny while he looks relieved and grateful

pages.text: "We need more carrots," Amir observed. Everyone laughed. Isla had an idea. "Let's plant new carrots together!" she suggested. "Benny can help us. He's good at digging!" Benny's face lit up with joy. "I'd love to help!"

illustration.description: The group stands in the empty carrot patch with gardening tools. Isla holds packets of carrot seeds while Benny looks excited and eager to help. Everyone has happy, enthusiastic expressions. Bright gardening tools and colorful seed packets create an atmosphere of new beginnings and teamwork.
illustration.alt: The friends with gardening tools ready to plant new carrots together

pages.text: They worked all morning planting carrot seeds. Benny was the best digger ever! "These carrots will be even better," he said proudly. "Because we grew them together!" Everyone agreed. Working together made everything more fun.

illustration.description: All the friends work happily in the garden with small tools appropriate to their size. Benny digs enthusiastic holes while others place seeds and water. The garden rows look neat and promising. Everyone has dirt on them but looks happy and accomplished. Bright sun shines on their productive work.
illustration.alt: All the friends working together planting carrot seeds in neat garden rows

pages.text: "Case closed!" Isla wrote in her notebook. She looked at her new friend Benny and all her old friends too. The mystery was solved, and they had a new friend. "Tomorrow we'll check on our seeds," she announced. "All of us together!" Everyone cheered happily.

illustration.description: Isla closes her detective notebook with satisfaction while surrounded by all her friends including Benny. They're all smiling and cheering with their hands/paws raised in celebration. The newly planted garden stretches behind them. Golden afternoon light creates a warm, triumphant mood of friendship and accomplishment.
illustration.alt: Isla and all her friends celebrating together with the newly planted garden behind them

metadata.illustrationStyle: Playful storybook illustration style. Rich saturated colors. Expressive characters with big eyes. Whimsical, like Pixar concept art.

questions.question: What was missing from the community garden?
questions.explanation: The carrots were missing from the garden, which started Isla's mystery investigation.

questions.question: Who found the first clue?
questions.explanation: Amir the ant found the small holes in the dirt, which was the first clue.

questions.question: Where did the carrot trail lead?
questions.explanation: Sofia found orange carrot pieces that made a trail leading to the old oak tree.

questions.question: Who took the carrots?
questions.explanation: Benny the beaver took the carrots because he was new and didn't know how to ask for help finding food.

questions.question: How did the friends solve the problem?
questions.explanation: The friends decided to plant new carrots together and included Benny as part of their community garden team.

pages.title: Complete the Detective Notes
pages.instructions: Help Isla complete her detective notes by filling in the missing words!
pages.text: Detective Isla's Notes: The _____ disappeared from our garden. We found small _____ in the dirt and orange _____ leading to the oak tree. The mystery animal was _____ the beaver, who was just hungry and _____. Now he's our new friend!

pages.title: Garden Friends Memory Game
pages.instructions: Fill in the missing words about Isla's friends and what they found!
pages.text: _____ the mouse saw the carrots yesterday. Sofia the _____ found orange carrot pieces. Amir the _____ discovered holes in the dirt. Zara the _____ helped look for clues. They all worked together to help _____ feel welcome!
